tiles.title: Safe Neighborhoods
tiles.description: Base yourself in Santa Monica, West Hollywood, or Los Feliz for comfort, walkability, and well-trafficked streets.

tiles.title: Smart Transit Tips
tiles.description: Use Uber or Lyft after dark, keep valuables hidden in your rental car, and avoid empty Metro stations late at night.

tiles.title: Emergency Support
tiles.description: Know when to call 911, share your live location with someone you trust, and step into a busy café or hotel lobby if you feel unsafe.
